description: Integration provider data for Jarvis onboarding setup flow

email.name: Email
email.description: Send customer emails through your preferred provider

brevo.name: Brevo
brevo.description: Formerly Sendinblue. Affordable email marketing + transactional email.
brevo.credentials_help: Find your API key at Settings > SMTP & API > API Keys
troubleshooting: Ensure API key has 'Send transactional emails' permission

sendgrid.name: SendGrid
sendgrid.description: Industry-standard email delivery platform by Twilio.
sendgrid.credentials_help: Create API key at Settings > API Keys with 'Mail Send' permission
troubleshooting: Verify API key has 'Mail Send' permission

aws_ses.name: AWS SES
aws_ses.description: Amazon Simple Email Service. High-volume, low-cost email delivery.
aws_ses.credentials_help: Create IAM user with SES permissions in AWS Console
troubleshooting: Verify IAM user has ses:SendEmail permission
Check if sending limits have been increased from sandbox

mailgun.name: Mailgun
mailgun.description: Email automation platform built for developers.
mailgun.credentials_help: Get API key from Domain Settings > API Keys
troubleshooting: Verify domain DNS records are properly configured
Check API key has sending permissions

postmark.name: Postmark
postmark.description: Fast email delivery with excellent inbox placement.
postmark.credentials_help: Get Server Token from your Server > API Tokens

custom_smtp.name: Custom SMTP
custom_smtp.description: Connect any SMTP server for email delivery.
custom_smtp.credentials_help: Contact your email administrator for SMTP credentials
troubleshooting: Verify SMTP host and port are correct
Test with STARTTLS if port 587, SSL if port 465

twilio.name: Twilio
twilio.description: Industry-leading SMS, voice, and verification platform.
twilio.credentials_help: Find Account SID and Auth Token at Console > Account > Keys & Credentials
troubleshooting: Verify Account SID format starts with 'AC'
Check phone number is in E.164 format (+1...)
Ensure account is not in trial mode for production

vonage.name: Vonage
vonage.description: Global SMS and voice API platform (formerly Nexmo).
vonage.credentials_help: Get API key and secret from Dashboard > Settings
troubleshooting: Check from_number is a registered Vonage number

messagebird.name: MessageBird
messagebird.description: Omnichannel communication platform with SMS and WhatsApp.
messagebird.credentials_help: Get API key from Dashboard > Developers > API Keys
troubleshooting: Verify API key has SMS sending permission

aws_sns.name: AWS SNS
aws_sns.description: Amazon Simple Notification Service for SMS delivery.
aws_sns.credentials_help: Create IAM user with SNS permissions in AWS Console
troubleshooting: Verify IAM user has sns:Publish permission

payment.name: Payment
payment.description: Process customer payments and manage subscriptions

paddle.name: Paddle
paddle.description: Complete payments platform for SaaS. Handles tax, compliance, and billing.
paddle.credentials_help: Get API key at Settings > Authentication > API Keys
troubleshooting: Verify API key is for correct environment (sandbox/production)
Ensure products and prices are created in Paddle dashboard

stripe.name: Stripe
stripe.credentials_help: Get API key at Developers > API Keys (use secret key)
troubleshooting: Use secret key (sk_live_...) not publishable key
Verify webhook signing secret is configured
Check if account is fully activated

razorpay.name: Razorpay
razorpay.description: India-focused payment gateway supporting UPI, cards, and wallets.
razorpay.credentials_help: Get keys at Settings > API Keys
troubleshooting: Check if account is KYC verified

crm.name: CRM
crm.description: Sync customer data with your CRM system

hubspot.name: HubSpot
hubspot.description: All-in-one CRM with marketing, sales, and service hubs.
hubspot.credentials_help: Get API key at Settings > Integrations > API Key
troubleshooting: Verify API key has required scopes

salesforce.name: Salesforce
salesforce.description: Enterprise CRM platform for customer relationship management.
salesforce.credentials_help: Create connected app in Salesforce Setup > App Manager
troubleshooting: Verify connected app has correct OAuth scopes
Ensure API access is enabled for your edition

ecommerce.name: E-commerce
ecommerce.description: Connect your online store for order and product data

shopify.name: Shopify
shopify.description: Leading e-commerce platform. Sync orders, products, and customers.
shopify.credentials_help: Create custom app in Shopify Admin > Apps > Develop apps
troubleshooting: Verify access token has required scopes (read_orders, read_products)

helpdesk.name: Help Desk
helpdesk.description: Import tickets and sync with your existing help desk

zendesk.name: Zendesk
zendesk.description: Customer service platform. Import tickets and sync data.
zendesk.credentials_help: Create API token at Admin > Channels > API > Token Access

freshdesk.name: Freshdesk
freshdesk.credentials_help: Get API key from Profile Settings > API Key
troubleshooting: Ensure API rate limits are not exceeded

slack.name: Slack
slack.description: Team communication platform. Get notifications and alerts.
slack.credentials_help: Create incoming webhook at your Slack workspace > Apps > Manage > Custom Integrations
troubleshooting: Check channel exists and app has posting permission

recommended.reason: Free tier covers most small stores
Best delivery rates for order updates
Most widely supported by e-commerce platforms
Handles tax and compliance for SaaS
Get ticket alerts in your team channel

email_setup.opening: Let's connect your email provider first. This is how Jarvis will send customer emails on your behalf — order confirmations, shipping updates, ticket responses, all through YOUR email service.
email_setup.follow_up: Which email service do you use? Or paste your API key and I'll auto-detect the provider.

sms_setup.opening: Now let's set up SMS. This lets Jarvis send text messages to your customers — appointment reminders, delivery updates, verification codes.
sms_setup.follow_up: Which SMS provider do you use?

payment_setup.opening: Payment provider time! This is how Jarvis will handle billing, refunds, and payment-related customer queries. If you already use a payment platform, we'll connect it so Jarvis can look up transactions and process refunds.
payment_setup.follow_up: Which payment platform does your business use?

optional_setup.opening: Great progress! Now for some optional integrations. These aren't required, but they make Jarvis even more powerful by connecting to your existing tools.
optional_setup.follow_up: Would you like to connect any of these? You can always set them up later from your dashboard.

completion.opening: Excellent! Your integrations are all set up. Here's a summary of what's connected and what you've skipped for now. Skipped integrations can be configured anytime from your dashboard settings.
completion.follow_up: Ready to upload your knowledge base and activate your AI agents?
